title: Pelagia (disambiguation)
content:
'''Pelagia''' could refer to several things:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troopship '''''[[Pelagia]]'''''
*Other items relating to the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]:
**The [[Starship/Legends|starship]] '''''[[Pelagia's Moon|Pelagia Star]]''''', later converted into the '''''Pelagia's Moon''''' space station
**The [[Wikipedia:Aristocracy|aristocratic]] [[Noble/Legends|House]] [[House Pelagia|'''Pelagia''']]
**The [[Sector/Legends|province]] [[Pelagia Province|'''Pelagia''']]
{{Disambig}}
